sectionSubtitles.matematica: Logic, ontology, structures. Rigor as a form of care.
sectionSubtitles.fede-e-chiesa: Theology, pastoral work, community. Thinking faith within time.
sectionSubtitles.parole: Ancient languages, semantics, philosophy of language.
sectionSubtitles.musica: Harmony, time, form. When mathematics sings.
sectionSubtitles.giochi: Combinatorics, game design, logic at play.

home.eyebrow: Fil d'Or — a space to think
home.heroTitle:
Rigor and meaning.
The same thread.
home.heroBody: I think about systems. Some are algorithms, some are communities, some are ancient texts. I study them with the same rigor and the same care.

lavoro.title: Work
lavoro.bio: I work on modeling complex problems, applied formal logic, and training in structured thinking. I'm a bridge between theoretical rigor and practical application — in technical, organizational, and educational contexts.

chiSono.title: About
chiSono.bio: I study systems — formal, human, linguistic. My background is in theoretical mathematics, with a parallel path through theology, pastoral work, and philosophy of language. I don't see them as separate worlds. The golden thread connects them.

contatti.title: Contact
contatti.intro: Reach out for projects, collaborations, or a conversation.
